title: Gruntak
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gruntak''' was the word used by the [[Amani/Legends|Amanin]] to describe all non-forested land on [[Maridun/Legends|Maridun]].

*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
